info.description: API for PlantPal - a plant care and health monitoring application.
info.title: PlantPal API

post.description: Authenticate using a Google ID token. Creates a new user if the email doesn't exist.
Upload a plant image for AI-powered disease diagnosis and open a chat session

get.description: Retrieve the chat history for a diagnosis session

post.description: Send a follow-up message in a diagnosis chat session
Authenticate with email and password to receive access and refresh tokens
Revoke a refresh token to invalidate a session

get.description: Retrieve the notification preferences for the authenticated user

put.description: Update notification preferences for the authenticated user

get.description: Get a list of all plants belonging to the authenticated user

post.description: Add a new plant to the user's collection

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific plant

put.description: Update details of an existing plant

delete.description: Remove a plant from the user's collection

get.description: Retrieve all activity logs for a specific plant

post.description: Record a new activity for a plant (watered, fertilized, repotted, etc.)

get.description: Retrieve the care plan for a specific plant

put.description: Update the care plan for a specific plant

get.description: Retrieve all growth metrics for a specific plant

post.description: Record a new growth measurement for a plant

get.description: Retrieve all reminders for a specific plant

post.description: Exchange a refresh token for a new access and refresh token pair (single-use rotation)
Create a new user account with full name, email, password, and phone number

get.description: Retrieve all incomplete reminders scheduled for today across all plants

put.description: Mark a reminder as completed or snooze it

post.description: Upload a plant image for AI-powered identification. Returns a preview for the user to confirm before saving.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific scan including analysis results

post.description: Confirm that the identified plant is correct, creating species, plant, care plan, and reminders
post.summary: Confirm a scan and create plant

valid.description: Valid is true if Time is not NULL
